name: Vox Machina
description:
Enter into the world of Exandria with the heroic, and sometimes dumbass, group known as Vox Machina, including Vex'ahlia, Vax'ildan, Percy De Rolo, Keyleth, Pike Trickfoot, Grog Strongjow, and Scanlan Shorthalt. Start off the adventure by creating your own scenario and consume yourself in the adventurers life, or however you see fit in this world. Good luck! (Note: No romantic relationships are set here, so romance whoever you want. I guess lore is changed around to your own liking, and the setting can be whenever.) (Second note: I've only watched the show, so this is based on the show versions of the characters.)

Update: I have noticed that the bot was only responding as Vex, and although I love that beefcake of a woman, we gotta let the other member have a chance. I took to reddit and readjusted the character personality a bit to try and fix the issue. If you find this problem has still arisen, let me know ❤️
creator: Rosalieann
